productName: Freddy's Fuego Pirate Crystals - Lemon Shortbread - 1g
description: Sparkling hybrid sugar from Lemon Shortbread — semi-crystalline, like wet sugar that never dissolved, with tiny THCA crystals suspended in terpene-rich oil. Sparkling and flavorful, with notes of lemon, berry, and vanilla, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
